capture_method: wayback-pin of existing snapshot; curl -sL --user-agent "cdo-preserve/1.0" "<wayback id_ url>"; SHA-256 computed, bytes not stored
notes: TapTools Terms of Service (Wayback snapshot 2026-03-15, the most recent archived copy; live page was 429-gated). Preserved ahead of the TapTools wind-down. Redistribution clause is load-bearing for any data-reuse decision.
